ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "equivalent_size" TEXT /* Equivalent size (e.g., 5XS, 4XS) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size (e.g., JXXS, JXS) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the size (e.g., 3-4 Y) */,
  "height_range_cm" TEXT /* Height range in centimeters (e.g., 100 - 109) */,
  "height_range_ft" TEXT /* Height range in feet and inches (e.g., 3FT2 - 3FT5) */,
  "chest_range_cm" TEXT /* Chest range in centimeters (e.g., 56 - 60) */,
  "chest_range_in" TEXT /* Chest range in inches (e.g., 22 - 23.5) */,
  "waist_range_cm" TEXT /* Waist range in centimeters (e.g., 53 - 56) */,
  "waist_range_in" TEXT /* Waist range in inches (e.g., 20.8 - 22) */,
  "hips_range_cm" TEXT /* Hips range in centimeters (e.g., 62 - 66) */,
  "hips_range_in" TEXT /* Hips range in inches (e.g., 24.4 - 26) */,
  "inseam_range_cm" TEXT /* Inseam range in centimeters (e.g., 40 - 45) */,
  "inseam_range_in" TEXT /* Inseam range in inches (e.g., 15.7 - 17.7) */,
  "sleeve_length_range_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length range in centimeters (e.g., 30 - 35) */,
  "sleeve_length_range_in" TEXT /* Sleeve length range in inches (e.g., 11.8 - 13.8) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for (e.g., Boys, Girls) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the product (e.g., 3-4 Y) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "child_name" TEXT /* Name of the child */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the child */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Height of the child in centimeters */,
  "chest_cm" INTEGER /* Chest measurement of the child in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" INTEGER /* Waist measurement of the child in centimeters */,
  "hips_cm" INTEGER /* Hips measurement of the child in centimeters */,
  "inseam_cm" INTEGER /* Inseam measurement of the child in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement of the child in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, store manager, product designer) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit recommendation */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer profile */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the product */,
  "fit_score" INTEGER /* Fit score (1-10) indicating how well the size fits the child's measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_recommendations_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES customer_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the product (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of inventory change (e.g., add, remove) */,
  "change_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the change */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales transaction */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for return */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_returns_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES customer_orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the shipping address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the shipping address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Card number of the payment method */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
